Info

Defines interface IConfigManager with attribute(s) and method(s). Interface for managing CLI configuration loading.

class ats_utilities.cli.iconfig_manager.IConfigManager[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines interface IConfigManager with attribute(s) and method(s). Interface for managing CLI configuration loading.

It defines:

attributes:

None

methods:
load_config - Loads the appropriate configuration base based on file type.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract load_config(info_file: str | None, verbose: bool = False) → CfgBase | IniBase | JsonBase | XmlBase | YamlBase | None[source]¶

Loads the appropriate configuration base based on file type.

Parameters:

  • info_file (<Optional[str]>) – Path to information file.

  • verbose (<bool>) – Verbose flag.

Returns:

Configuration object.

Return type:

<Config>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError
